arts.ttl: Abraham on Milan, Mourinho and Chelsea memories
arts.sum: BBC Sport's Nedum Onuoha travels to Italy to sample a classic Milanese dinner with AC Milan striker Tammy Abraham while catching up on what life has been like for the forward playing in Italy since his move from Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca will take no risks with duo for Heidenheim clash
arts.sum: Malo Gusto and Pedro Neto will be rested ahead of Sunday’s Premier League game with Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca insists £53m Chelsea star is NOT for sale and won't leave in January despite reports he is unhappy with being part of the Blues' cup team this season
arts.sum: KIERAN GILL IN HEIDENHEIM: asked during his pre-match press conference at the Voith Arena, Maresca said: 'I spoke to HIM days ago and he did not say he was unhappy.'

arts.ttl: Maresca confirms Chelsea's Nkunku transfer plan
arts.sum: Speaking to the media ahead of Chelsea's Conference League clash with Heidenheim, the Italian insisted that Nkunku was 'absolutely' not for sale. Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca has rubbished suggestions that Christopher Nkunku could leave the club in January.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea want Premier League club to knock £35m off their price tag for 'sensational' target
arts.sum: Chelsea have been linked in the transfer rumour mill with a Premier League attacker, but they believe he’s currently overpriced. It’s common knowledge that it’s...

arts.ttl: Acheampong returns: Chelsea contract rebel pardoned
arts.sum: Despite being one of the academy's highest-rated talents, the youngster had not been allowed to play or even train with any of Chelsea's teams in what was viewed as a brutal and controversial decision by the club. Chelsea prospect Josh Acheampong has been spotted back in training for the first time since being frozen out.

arts.ttl: 'Can be available': Enzo Maresca says two Chelsea players could be back fit to face Aston Villa on Sunday
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca has just provided a double boost on the fitness of two players ahead of this weekend’s match against Aston Villa....

arts.ttl: Todd Boehly and new Chelsea partner could strike £600m Saudi deal after talks in September
Chelsea’s Cole Palmer told he needs trophies to become one of world’s best players
arts.sum: Former Chelsea midfielder Gus Poyet believes Cole Palmer needs to win trophies to be included in the conversations surrounding the attacker being one the best players in the world. Speaking to BetVictor, Poyet said: “Cole Palmer is the best player in the Premier League right now.

arts.ttl: Report: Barcelona will make big-money offer for 'excellent' player linked to Chelsea
